title: pinus tabuliformis subsp. umbraculifera
intro: Pinus tabuliformis subsp. umbraculifera, also known as the Chinese white pine, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to China. This tree has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pinus tabuliformis subsp. umbraculifera include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, essential oil, and resin, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
